title: Papyrus #0350: Greek-Egyptian Tax Receipt
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — tax receipt document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — tax receipt document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a tax receipt document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
